examples: Dakota Gasification of North Dakota captures CO2 at a plant that converts coal into synthetic natural gas.
The Weyburn-Midale CO2 project is burying carbondioxide from a coal gasification plant in a depleted oil field.
China has made fertilizers through gasification for decades.
Shell aims to combine coal gasification with gas-to-diesel technology in an alliance with coal miner Anglo American.
The oil goes into a de-gasification plant, and then four-fifths of it is stored for export.
